rows.name: Medical Examining Board
rows.authority: Office of the Governor — Boards & Commissions
rows.mandate: Licenses and disciplines Wisconsin physicians. Thirteen members — ten licensed doctors and three public members — appointed by the Governor, Senate-confirmed (Wis. Stat. § 15.405(7)).

rows.name: Board for People with Developmental Disabilities
rows.authority: Office of the Governor — Boards & Commissions
rows.mandate: Wisconsin's federally mandated DD council. Twenty-eight members — twenty-one governor-appointed, at least 60% people with developmental disabilities or family members.
rows.criticalNote: Inventory listing — apply any time · 21 of 28 seats are governor-appointed
